nodes.context: One of the Five Families of New York; involved in racketeering, murder, and drug trafficking.
One of the Five Families of New York; involved in organized crime activities.
One of the Five Families of New York; involved in organized crime and provided a burial ground for the Bonanno family.

edges.context: Bonanno capo Joseph Massino turned to Colombo boss Carmine Persico for advice on handling the coup.
Gambino boss Paul Castellano advised Massino, and Gambino capo John Gotti arranged burial of bodies as a favor.
